label: Violet Oath Stockroom
description: Violet Oath Stockroom forms the secured back-of-house magazine of the Violet Oath Armory, enclosed in slagcrete walls and faced with bolted steel shelving fixed to the basalt substrate. Numbered lock-crates, oil-sealed tins, and cartridge caskets occupy deep rack-bays beneath ash-gasketed vents that keep the city’s abrasive grit out of the store. Narrow lumen strips and the bruise-colored auroral bleed through armored panes cast violet sheens across preservative-slick metal. A shielded inventory slate station and tagged chain-hooks formalize controlled issue and return amid the system’s persistent vox interference.
